title: linuxServerOptimization
description: A performance-focused Fabric modpack built for low-latency multiplayer and vanilla-style gameplay, featuring FPS and quality-of-life enhancements.
body:
# Overview
This modpack is built for optimized performance and seamless multiplayer experience. This pack is ideal for private SMP servers, lightweight survival playthroughs, or anyone who wants better performance without sacrificing vanilla mechanics on their servers. This pack also contains some QoL mods. This pack is intended for server-side use, and as such does not include any fps specific improvment mods.

## Performance Enhancements
- Fabric API – required base for Fabric mods

- FerriteCore – reduces and optimizes memory usage

- Lithium – optimizes game logic for better server/client performance

- C2ME - improves chunk performance and generation

- (Removed until 1.21.11 Support) Krypton – speeds up networking for improved latency and connection stability

## Quality of Life
- ShulkerBox Tooltip – view contents of shulker boxes in your inventory

- AppleSkin – shows hunger/saturation values for food

- Text Formatting Everywhere – allows color codes in signs, books, and more

- Disconnect Packet Fix – prevents rare disconnect bugs and improves stability

## Multiplayer
- (Removed until 1.21.11 Support) Global Villager Discounts – applies Hero of the Village discounts globally

- Chunky – allows for the pregeneration of chunks
